summary: A clarified FM broadcast tape with plenty of high‑in‑the‑mix Jerry makes this pre‑FM board recording sound excellent despite limited show detail.
review: The three reviewers all give five stars, praising the crispness of the FM broadcast source after Jay Ashley’s clarification work and noting that Jerry Garcia is “full out” and prominent in the mix. While no specific songs are highlighted, the consensus is that the tape captures a classic Dead vibe with excellent audio quality for a fan‑recorded broadcast.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are five‑star and enthusiastic; they focus on the strong, clarified FM broadcast sound and overall enjoyment with no negative comments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded from a Philly FM broadcast (WIOQ/WMMR) onto a cheap cassette deck; post‑processing by Jay Ashley and Gary Field provides clear, crisp sound with Jerry’s guitar very high in the mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific set‑list commentary was provided; reviewers focused on overall vibe rather than individual song performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as “full out” and high in the mix, indicating a strong guitar presence.
